description: A 4B-parameter causal language model optimized as a fine-tuning base with 262K context length, designed for instruction following and code tasks.
An 8B vision-language model optimized for long-horizon, multi-step agentic tasks like browser and desktop automation.
**Jan-v2-VL** is an 8B vision-language model optimized for long-horizon, multi-step agentic tasks in software environments like browsers and desktop apps.
A 4B parameter math reasoning model fine-tuned from Qwen3-4B with a distinct casual, meme-savvy personality shaped by Menlo Research.
A small, locally-runnable code-tuned model for coding tasks and lightweight agent workflows.
Jan-Nano-128k is a compact non-thinking language model with native 128k context window designed for research applications.
A 30B vision-language model for long-horizon agentic tasks with low error accumulation, based on Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B-Thinking.
A 4-bit quantized version of Jan-v3-4B-base-instruct converted to MLX format for text generation on Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit quantized MLX conversion of an 8B vision-language model optimized for agentic automation, UI control, and multi-step task execution.
8-bit MLX-quantized 8B vision-language model for agentic UI automation and multi-step task execution.
**Summary:** This is an 8B-parameter bfloat16 MLX vision-language model for agentic automation and UI control tasks, converted from Janhq's Jan-v2-VL-high.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of an 8B vision-language model optimized for UI automation and agentic tasks.
A 4-bit quantized MLX conversion of an 8B vision-language model designed for agentic automation and UI control tasks.
An 8-bit MLX-quantized 8B vision-language model for agentic automation and UI control tasks.
An 8-bit quantized MLX conversion of Jan-v2-VL-low, an 8B vision-language model optimized for agentic automation and UI control tasks.
This is a bfloat16 MLX conversion of Jan-v2-VL-low, an 8B vision-language model optimized for agentic automation and UI control tasks.
MLX conversion of Jan-v2-VL-med, an 8B vision-language model for agentic automation and UI control tasks.
Qwen3.5-35B-A3B is Alibaba's multimodal MoE language model with 35B total/3B active parameters, supporting 262K context length and vision capabilities.
Olmo 3 Think is a 7B open language model by Ai2 with chain-of-thought reasoning, trained on Dolma 3 and Dolci datasets, excelling at math, coding, and reasoning tasks.

Olmo 3 7B Instruct is an open-source 7B parameter language model by Allen Institute for AI, trained on Dolma 3 data, with strong math and reasoning capabilities, using <|im_start|> chat template and Apache 2.0 license.
A 32B parameter open language model with chain-of-thought reasoning capabilities developed by Allen AI.
MLX-converted text generation model from Kimi-K2.5 for Apple Silicon.
This is a 4-bit quantized Gemma 3 4B Instruct model converted to MLX format for image-text-to-text tasks on Apple Silicon.
An MLX-converted automatic speech recognition model for transcribing audio in 24 languages.
MLX-converted GPT-OSS-20B model for text generation.
A text-to-speech model converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
MLX speech recognition model for transcribing audio files.
A 4-bit MLX conversion of Mistral's Devstral-Small-2-24B-Instruct-2512 vision language model.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of the Google Gemma 3 12B instruction-tuned model, converted for use with the `mlx-vlm` library.
A 4-bit quantized 1B parameter instruction-tuned Llama 3.2 model converted to MLX format for text generation on Apple Silicon.
4-bit quantized Qwen3.5-9B MLX model for Apple Silicon vision-language inference.
This is an MLX conversion of the Gemma 3 27B Instruct model.
4-bit quantized Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B model converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit quantized version of Qwen3-1.7B converted to MLX format for text generation on Apple silicon.
A 4-bit quantized MLX conversion of all-MiniLM-L6-v2 for sentence embeddings on Apple Silicon.
A 6-bit MLX-quantized vision-language model converted from Qwen3.5-2B for image-text generation on Apple Silicon.
This is a 4-bit quantized version of the Google Gemma 3 1B instruction-tuned model, converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon using the `mlx-lm` library.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct for text generation.
MLX-converted 4-bit quantized version of Qwen3.5-35B-A3B for image-text-to-text tasks.
MLX-converted 4-bit Qwen3.5-27B model for image-text-to-text generation.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 for text generation.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of Qwen3.5-4B for Apple Silicon (~2.9G disk size).
MLX-converted 8-bit vision-language model from Qwen3.5-0.8B for Apple Silicon, runnable via mlx-vlm.
A 4-bit quantized version of Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct converted to MLX format for Apple devices.
A 4-bit MLX-quantized Qwen3.5-27B model distilled from Claude 4.6 Opus reasoning, optimized for Apple Silicon Macs with 24GB+ RAM.
Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3 quantized to 4-bit and converted to MLX format.
4-bit quantized Qwen3-0.6B model converted to MLX format for text generation.
MLX-converted 8-bit Qwen3.5-35B-A3B model for image-text-to-text tasks.
A 4-bit quantized version of Google's Gemma 2 2B instruction model, converted to run on Apple Silicon via the MLX framework.
MLX-converted 4-bit quantized version of Qwen3.5-9B for image-text-to-text tasks, optimized for Apple Silicon.
4-bit quantized MLX version of Qwen3-4B for text generation on Apple Silicon.
This is a 4-bit quantized MLX version of Josiefied-Qwen3-8B-abliterated for chat/text generation using the mlx-lm library.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of Meta Llama 3.1 8B Instruct model for Apple Silicon.
MLX-optimized 4-bit quantized version of Ministral-3-3B-Instruct for image understanding tasks.
A 4-bit quantized version of Qwen3-8B converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon devices.
An 8-bit quantized Qwen3-0.6B model converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit MLX-quantized version of Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct for efficient code generation on Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit MLX converted version of Google's Gemma 3n E2B model for text generation using the `mlx-lm` library.
This is an MLX-converted 8-bit quantized version of OpenAI's GPT-OSS 120B model for text generation.
MLX-converted 4-bit quantized version of Qwen3.5-122B-A10B for image-text-to-text tasks.
A 4-bit quantized version of Meta's Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct converted to MLX format for Apple devices.
A 4-bit quantized Qwen3-30B-A3B model converted to MLX format.
MLX-converted Whisper large-v3-turbo model for audio transcription using the mlx-whisper library.
4-bit quantized Qwen3.5-0.8B vision-language model for Apple Silicon using MLX framework.
4-bit quantized Gemma 2 9B Instruct model converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of GLM-4.7-Flash for text generation using the mlx-lm library.
MLX-converted 8-bit version of GLM-4.7-Flash for text generation.
A 4-bit quantized MLX conversion of Google's Gemma 3N E4B IT model, designed for Apple Silicon and used with the mlx-lm library.
4-bit quantized GLM-4.7 model converted to MLX format for text generation.
8-bit quantized MLX version of Meta's Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct language model for Apple Silicon.
Meta's Llama 3.1 70B instruction-tuned language model, converted to 4-bit MLX format for Apple Silicon.
4-bit MLX quantized version of Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct for text generation on Apple Silicon.
An MLX-converted quantized version of Microsoft's Phi-4-mini-instruct for text generation.
This is an 8-bit MLX-converted version of Qwen3.5-9B for image-text-to-text generation using the mlx-vlm library.
MLX-converted version of Kimi-K2-Thinking for text generation using mlx-lm.
An 8-bit MLX converted version of Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct for Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit quantized version of Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
8-bit MLX converted version of GLM-4.5-Air for text generation.
A 4-bit MLX-quantized version of Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct for text generation on Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit quantized MLX model for text generation converted from LiquidAI's LFM2.5-1.2B-Instruct.
This is a 4-bit quantized version of Qwen3.5-2B converted to MLX format for running on Apple Silicon devices.
A 5-bit quantized version of GLM-4.7-Flash converted to MLX format for text generation on Apple Silicon.
An 8-bit quantized version of Meta's Llama 3.1 8B Instruct model, converted to MLX format for Apple devices.
8-bit MLX version of Meta's Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct for text generation.
MLX format conversion of Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct model in 4-bit precision.
4-bit quantized MLX version of Kimi-K2-Instruct for text generation.
DeepSeek-V3.1-4bit is a 4-bit quantized version of DeepSeek-V3.1 converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
MLX conversion of Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Thinking (4-bit quantized, text generation).
A 4-bit quantized version of Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit quantized DeepSeek Coder 33B model converted to MLX format for local inference.
This is a 4-bit quantized MLX version of Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct for text generation on Apple Silicon.
A 6-bit quantized version of GLM-4.7-Flash converted to MLX format for text generation using mlx-lm.
An 8-bit MLX-quantized version of Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507 for text generation on Apple Silicon.
MLX-converted 8B parameter instruction-tuned language model from Meta's Llama 3.1, optimized for Apple silicon.
An 8-bit quantized version of Qwen3-30B-A3B converted to MLX format for text generation.
A 3-bit quantized version of MiniMax-M2.1 converted to MLX format for text generation.
An 8-bit MLX quantized version of Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Thinking for text generation on Apple Silicon.

MiniMax-M2.1-8bit is an 8-bit quantized version of MiniMax-M2.1 converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
8-bit quantized MLX version of GLM-4.7 for text generation on Apple Silicon.
MLX-optimized version of Meta's Llama 3.3 70B Instruct language model for Apple devices.
MLX-converted GLM-4.5-Air model for text generation using mlx-lm.
A 6-bit quantized version of GLM-4.7 converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
An 8-bit quantized MLX conversion of Qwen3.5-27B-heretic, an abliterated vision-language model with 262K context.
Mixed-precision quantized Qwen3.5-9B for Apple Silicon using OptiQ's sensitivity-driven quantization at 4.5 bits-per-weight.
An 8-bit MLX-converted version of Qwen3.5-27B for image-text-to-text tasks.
NVIDIA Nemotron-3-Nano-30B text generation model in 4-bit MLX format for Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit MLX-converted version of Mistral-Nemo-Instruct-2407 for use with mlx-lm.
MLX-converted 4-bit quantized version of Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct for image-text-to-text generation.
MLX-converted 4-bit quantized version of Qwen3.5-397B-A17B for image-text-to-text generation.
MLX-converted Qwen text-to-speech model with voice cloning support.
An 8-bit quantized Qwen3.5-2B vision-language model converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon, with ~2.5GB disk size.
An 8-bit quantized MLX version of Qwen3.5-9B for vision-language tasks on Apple Silicon.
Qwen3.5-9B is a 9B parameter multimodal language model with vision support and up to 262K context length.
Qwen3.5-27B is a 27B-parameter multimodal language model supporting text, images, and video with native reasoning/thinking capabilities, up to 262K context length.
Qwen3.5-4B is a 4B-parameter multimodal vision-language model supporting text, images, and video with 262K token context and built-in thinking mode.
Qwen3.5-122B-A10B is a 122B-parameter MoE vision-language model with 10B activated experts, supporting 262K context length and multimodal reasoning.
A Qwen3.5-27B reasoning model distilled from Claude-4.6 Opus via SFT, using structured CoT in `<think>` tags for analytical tasks.
An uncensored GGUF version of Qwen3.5-9B with zero refusals, supporting text, images, and video in multiple quantizations.
Uncensored Qwen3.5-35B-A3B MoE vision model in GGUF format.
OpenAI's 20B open-weight reasoning model with Apache 2.0 license, MXFP4 quantization, agentic capabilities, and full chain-of-thought support.
Qwen3-Coder-Next is an 80B-parameter (3B activated) MoE coding model with 256K context, optimized for local agentic coding with tool-calling capabilities.
GLM-4.7-Flash is a 30B-A3B MoE text generation model optimized for lightweight local deployment via vLLM, SGLang, or transformers.
Qwen3.5-2B is a 2B-parameter multimodal language model supporting text, images, and video with 262K context length.
Quantized GGUF versions of Qwen3.5-35B-A3B for llama.cpp and compatible tools, ranging from Q8_0 (36.91GB) to IQ1_M (8.64GB).
Fully uncensored Qwen3.5-27B multimodal model with zero refusals, available in GGUF format.
This is a repository of GGUF quantized versions of the Crow-9B-Opus-4.6-Distill-Heretic_Qwen3.5 language model, offering various quantization options from Q2_K to f16.

NVIDIA's Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B is a hybrid Mamba2-Transformer Mixture-of-Experts model with 30B total parameters (3.5B active) trained on ~25T tokens, supporting six languages and designed for reasoning tasks with configurable thought traces.
A 397B parameter multimodal language model with vision capabilities supporting text, images, and video inputs, with up to 262K context length.
Qwen3.5-9B fine-tuned with Claude 4.6 Opus reasoning distillation for structured chain-of-thought generation.
GGUF quantized versions of Qwen3.5-27B model in various quantization levels (Q8_0 to IQ2_XXS) for use with llama.cpp and compatible inference tools.
Fully uncensored Qwen3.5-4B multimodal GGUF model with zero refusals, available in multiple quantizations.

A Qwen3.5-4B reasoning model fine-tuned with Claude-4.6 Opus chain-of-thought distillation using LoRA, featuring structured `<think>` thinking tags and improved benchmarks on GPQA (38.88) and ARC-Challenge (66.38).
A GGUF quantized version of Qwen3.5-27B reasoning model with various IQ and Q quantization options (6-22GB).
Unsloth's hosted Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct: a 30.5B parameter MoE coding model with 256K context, optimized for agentic coding and tool calling.
GGUF quantized versions of Qwen3.5-9B by bartowski using llama.cpp, with various quantization levels (Q8_0 to IQ2_S) ranging from 3.48GB to 17.92GB for local LLM inference.
GGUF quants of an uncensored Llama 3.3 8B thinking model.
Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct-GGUF is a 7B parameter instruction-tuned code generation model in GGUF format, supporting multiple quantizations for local deployment via llama.cpp.
Google's Gemma 3 12B instruction-tuned multimodal model with 128K context, supporting text and image inputs.
**Uncensored GGUF quant of GLM-4.7-Flash optimized for creative fiction writing, storytelling, and roleplaying across all genres.**
A Qwen3.5-9B reasoning model distilled from Claude 4.6 Opus that achieves higher accuracy with 20%+ shorter chain-of-thought.
A 9-billion-parameter LLM distilled from Claude Opus 4.6 into Qwen 3.5 architecture, available in GGUF format.
GGUF quantizations of Tesslate's OmniCoder-9B code model, with Q4_K_M (~5.7 GB) recommended for most users, usable via llama.cpp.
A Qwen3-14B model distilled from Claude 4.5 Opus with high reasoning effort, trained for coding, science, and general use.
A Qwen3.5-2B model fine-tuned with Claude-4.6 Opus reasoning data for structured chain-of-thought problem-solving.
A reasoning-distilled Qwen3.5-27B model from Claude 4.6 Opus achieving 96.91% HumanEval with 24% shorter chain-of-thought.
A reasoning-distilled version of GLM-4.7-Flash trained on high-reasoning Claude Opus 4.5 data for coding, science, and research tasks.
A Mixture of Experts model combining eight Llama 3.2 3B models into an 18.4B parameter model optimized for uncensored creative writing, fiction, and roleplay with a 128k context window.
MiniMax-M2.5 is a state-of-the-art AI model excelling in coding, agentic tasks, and office work, offering industry-leading speed (100 tokens/sec) at just $1/hour.
A decensored GGUF quantization of Qwen3.5-35B-A3B with reduced content restrictions (4 vs 91 refusals per 100 prompts).
Qwen3-8B-GGUF is an 8B-parameter quantized language model with unique switchable thinking modes for complex reasoning or efficient dialogue.
An uncensored GGUF quantization of Qwen3.5-122B-A10B MoE model with custom K_P quants for llama.cpp/LM Studio.
Uncensored Qwen3.5-2B GGUF model with all refusals removed while preserving full capabilities.
An uncensored Qwen3.5-9B fine-tuned on Claude-4.6-OS data for creative writing and storytelling with vision support, optimized as a GGUF model.
A 4B-parameter uncensored vision-language model in GGUF format for multimodal text and image tasks.
Microsoft's BitNet b1.58 2B is a native 1-bit LLM with 2B parameters trained on 4T tokens, achieving comparable performance to full-precision models while using significantly less memory and compute.
A Qwen3.5-4B model fine-tuned on Claude 4.6 Opus reasoning data for 33% shorter chain-of-thought with competitive accuracy.
Gemma is a lightweight open LLM from Google, offered in 2B/7B sizes, trained on 6T tokens, with CPU/GPU and quantization support.
An uncensored 20B Mixture of Experts model optimized for coding and creative tasks, available in multiple quantization formats.
Hybrid AI model combining instruction-following and reasoning capabilities with multimodal input support in a 119B parameter MoE architecture.
Quantized GGUF versions of a Qwen3.5 MoE reasoning model distilled from Claude 4.6 Opus, available in various quantization levels from IQ1 to Q6_K.
A censorship-removed (abliterated) version of the Qwen3-4b-Z-Image-Turbo text encoder for unrestricted image generation.
GLM-5 is a 744B-parameter MoE LLM (40B active) with DeepSeek Sparse Attention that achieves state-of-the-art open-source performance on reasoning, coding, and agentic tasks.
A 4B parameter fine-tuned Qwen 3 model that expands simple text concepts into detailed, cinematic AI image generation prompts.
A GGUF quantized version of an uncensored Mistral-Nemo-based creative writing model, available in various precision levels from Q2_K to Q8_0.
A 4B-parameter LLM distilled from Claude Opus 4.6 into Qwen 3.5, trained on 15 datasets (~25.5k examples) for reasoning, coding, and creative tasks.
This is a GGUF-converted version of zai-org/GLM-OCR for use with llama-server.
A Qwen3.5-0.8B model fine-tuned with LoRA via Unsloth on Claude-4.6 Opus reasoning data for structured chain-of-thought generation.
GGUF quantizations of NVIDIA's Nemotron-Cascade-2-30B-A3B model in various precision levels (IQ1-Q6).
A 9B parameter multimodal model supporting vision, speech, and full-duplex live streaming on local devices.
A Qwen3.5-27B model fine-tuned on Claude Opus 4.6 reasoning data for coding, creative writing, and general tasks, showing improved benchmark scores over the base model.
Gemma 3 is Google's 4B parameter instruction-tuned multimodal model in GGUF Q4_0 format with 128K context window, using Quantization Aware Training for efficient deployment.
Llama.cpp imatrix quantizations of GLM-4.7-Flash model (MIT licensed, 7.6GB-31.8GB) for CPU/GPU inference in various tools.
This repository provides GGUF quantized versions of the MiroThinker-1.7-mini language model in various precision levels (6.5GB to 25.2GB) for local deployment.
Qwen3.5-9B fine-tuned with Gemini 3.1 Pro reasoning distillation for structured Chain-of-Thought reasoning.
Quantized code generation model based on Qwen3.5, available in GGUF format from bf16 to IQ2_S.
An abliterated 9B vision-language model built on Qwen3.5-9B for unfiltered image captioning with reduced refusal behaviors, intended for research purposes.
This repository provides GGUF quantized versions of a distilled Qwen3.5 MoE reasoning model in sizes ranging from 7.6GB to 28.6GB.
A Qwen3.5-35B MoE model distilled from Claude-4.6 Opus reasoning patterns, fine-tuned for structured chain-of-thought problem-solving.
Quantized Qwen3.5-35B-A3B model variants with MXFP4 for MoE tensors and Q8/BF16/FP16 options for llama.cpp.
An uncensored Q4_K_M quantized GGUF version of Qwen 3.5 9B for local Ollama/llama.cpp deployment, used in PhdBooster as a vision fallback.
Uncensored 30B-A3B MoE GLM-4.7 Flash with 202K context for llama.cpp/LM Studio, removing more refusals than Balanced variant.
RuvLTRA Claude Code is the world's first self-learning, swarm-optimized code generation model (0.5B params, Q4_K_M quantized GGUF) designed for Claude Code IDE integration with real-time adaptation.
Decensored Qwen3.5-27B GGUF quantizations with 92% fewer refusals than the original model.
This is a GGUF quantized version of NVIDIA's Nemotron-Cascade-2-30B-A3B reasoning model with multiple quantization options (Q2_K to Q8_0).
A Japanese-optimized GGUF model of Qwen3.5-9B using Unsloth's Dynamic Quantization 2.0, runnable on CPU with 16GB RAM.
A lightweight 1B parameter "uncensored" variant of Google's Gemma 3 1B IT, optimized for fast inference with reduced refusal bias.
A GGUF quantized version of Qwen3.5-40B, fine-tuned for uncensored creative writing and storytelling, available in various quantization sizes from Q2_K to Q8_0.
Uncensored aggressive variant of GPT-OSS 120B MoE model in MXFP4 GGUF format, requiring --jinja flag and ~61GB VRAM.
GGUF quantized versions of an abliterated Qwen3.5-27B model with reasoning capabilities, available in various quantization levels from Q2_K to Q8_0.
This is a GGUF quantized version of Huihui-Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-Claude-4.6-Opus-abliterated, an abliterated reasoning model with various quantization options (Q2_K to Q8_0).
GGUF quantized versions of Huihui-Qwen3.5-27B-Claude-4.6-Opus abliterated reasoning model, available in various IQ and Q quantization formats.
A Llama 3.2 7B uncensored creative writing model with 128k context, enhanced prose abilities via Brainstorm 40x, designed for fiction storytelling across all genres.
An abliterated (uncensored) version of Google's Gemma 3 12B IT, optimized as a text encoder for LTX-2 video generation to minimize prompt refusals while maintaining quality.
Uncensored 20B parameter GGUF model, aggressive variant tuned for maximum output with fewer refusals.
An uncensored Qwen3-VL-8B vision-language model with 256K context, available in multiple GGUF quantizations for use with llama.cpp and similar tools.
A reasoning model distilled from Gemini 3.1 Pro onto Qwen3.5-27B for structured analytical Chain-of-Thought thinking.
An uncensored Qwen3-4B text encoder (GGUF Q4_0) for Flux2 Klein that removes safety filters to allow NSFW content generation.
Specialized MoE quantizations for NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-BF16 offering four options (IQ3_S to Q5_K_M) from 52.66 to 80.27 GiB.
A float32-precision Mixture of Experts model merging four Mistral 7B models into a 24B parameter model optimized for uncensored creative writing, fiction, and roleplay with vivid prose.
An uncensored 8B vision-language model based on Qwen3-VL-8B with 256K context, designed for reliability-critical tasks.
An abliterated (uncensored) GGUF model for image-text-to-text based on Kimi-K2.5 with significantly reduced safety filtering.
An uncensored Qwen3-4B-2507 instruct model with aggressive uncensoring for lossless, refusal-free responses.
A 4-bit GGUF quantized version of Huihui-Qwen3.5-27B-Claude-4.6-Opus, an abliterated (uncensored) Qwen model.
GGUF-quantized Qwen3.5-9B model with safety guardrails removed for research and creative use.
An experimental 42B parameter uncensored fine-tune of GLM-4.7 Flash optimized for creative fiction writing with specific sampler settings.
A Japanese language model finetuned with Unsloth and converted to GGUF format, available in Q4_K_M and BF16-mmproj quantizations.
This is a GGUF quantized version of a Qwen3.5-4B model fine-tuned for creative writing, offering various quantization options from IQ1 to Q6.
A 12-expert Mixture of Experts model allowing users to directly activate specific distilled models (Gemini, Claude, GPT-51, etc.) by naming them in prompts.
A Llama-3.1-8B model fine-tuned for offensive cybersecurity research, red-team scenarios, and exploit reasoning with safety guardrails.
This is a GGUF quantized vision language model of Kimi-VL-A3B-Thinking-2506 with various IQ and Q quantization types ranging from 5.2GB to 14.4GB.
